No malicious code, backdoors, or suspicious behaviors are present.\n- **Obfuscated scores:** All zero, the code is straightforward and autogenerated without obfuscation.\n- **Risk scores:** Ranging from 0 to 0.2, all very low, indicating minimal security concern.\n\n**Considering the nature of the code:**\n\n- It is an autogenerated factory class for deploying/interacting with a well-known, verified smart contract.\n- The bytecode is standard for such contracts.\n- No external network connections, data exfiltration, or malicious logic is evident.\n- The code is not obfuscated and contains no secrets or backdoors.\n\n### Final Justified Scores:\n\n- **Malware:** 0 (no signs of malicious activity)\n- **Obfuscated:** 0 (clear, autogenerated code)\n- **Risk:** 0.1 (very low, typical for deployment wrappers; minor risk if deployed by untrusted parties, but no inherent vulnerabilities)\n\n---\n\n**Summary:** The reports are consistent and accurate.
